calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Feb-13-2013 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-08-2009 Dismissal Or Judgment On File As To All Defendants

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Aug-18-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Amir S. Sarreshtehdary, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Debra Witt, as Successor-In-Interest to Decedent Theodore George.
No appearance by defendant Lawson Mechanical Contractors.
Default was entered against defendant on January 23, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on August 12, 2009.
Order waiving witness appearance at default prove-up hearing was filed on August 7, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Debra Witt, as Successor-in-Interest to Decedent Theodore George, and against the Defaulted Defendant Lawson Mechanical Contractors as follows:

Interest - $194.52.
Costs - $354.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $548.52.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
